title: Minimum Height Trees
input_format: An integer `n` and an array `edges` where `edges[i] = [ai, bi]` indicates that there is an undirected edge between `ai` and `bi`.
output_format: A list of all root labels of the Minimum Height Trees.
constraints:
- `1 <= n <= 2 * 10^4`
- `edges.length == n - 1`
- `0 <= ai, bi < n`
- `ai != bi`
- The given input is guaranteed to form a tree.
function_signature: function findMinHeightTrees(n: number, edges: number[][]): number[] {}
